semantic_text: Update architecture guide: enhance table of contents and add page ID management details

Add Korean developer guides for Natural-UI and Natural-JS components

- Created DEVELOPER-GUIDE-UI.Shell-Notify.md for Notify component documentation.
- Created DEVELOPER-GUIDE-UI.md for comprehensive Natural-UI documentation.
- Created DEVELOPER-GUIDE.md for overall Natural-JS framework documentation.
Add developer guide for Natural-UI Pagination component

Remove outdated documentation for Validator API, including demo, constructor, examples, functions, overview, validation rule list, and task planning. This cleanup enhances clarity and maintains focus on current features and usage.
Add Natural-DATA Module Developer Guide with comprehensive sections on Formatter, Validator, and usage examples

Enhance documentation for Natural-JS

- Updated the Natural-ARCHITECTURE Guide with a comprehensive Table of Contents.
- Expanded the Natural-JS Config Reference Guide to include detailed configuration options.
- Improved the Natural-CORE Reference Guide with a structured Table of Contents and additional sections.
- Enhanced the Natural-JS Examples Guide with a detailed Table of Contents and implementation overviews for each example.
- Revised the Getting Started Guide to include more detailed setup instructions and project structure.
- Updated the TypeScript Developer Guide with a clearer structure and additional FAQ section.
- Improved the UI component documentation (Alert, Button, Datepicker, Form, Grid, List, Popup, Select, Tab, Tree) with consistent Table of Contents and detailed sections.
- Enhanced the UI.Shell Documents and Notify component documentation with structured content and clear sections.
- Updated the main Natural-UI Developer Guide with a comprehensive Table of Contents and improved organization.
- Revised the Natural-JS Guidebook to include a practical overview and structured Table of Contents for better navigation.

Refactor documentation for UI components and add mobile developer guide

- Updated instantiation examples in DEVELOPER-GUIDE-UI-Alert.md and DEVELOPER-GUIDE-UI-Button.md to use `const` instead of `var`.
- Changed function expressions to arrow functions in alert and button examples for consistency and modern syntax.
- Corrected example code in DEVELOPER-GUIDE.md to include semicolons for better readability.
- Added a comprehensive mobile developer guide (DEVELOPER-GUIDE-MOBILE.md) detailing mobile environment support, UI optimization, touch event handling, responsive design, performance optimization, hybrid app integration, and troubleshooting common issues.
Add guideline to convert JavaScript examples to ES6 syntax in translation instructions
Add developer guides for Natural-UI components: Alert, Button, and Datepicker
Refine consistency guidelines for Natural-JS developer documentation
Add detailed guidelines for translating Natural-JS documentation and create a comprehensive Getting Started guide

Update documentation for Alert component

- Revised task management instructions in guide.prompt.md to include file paths for completed tasks.
- Marked several tasks as completed in tasks.md for the Natural-UI section.
- Added a new API demo documentation for the Alert component in alert-api-demo.md.
- Created detailed documentation for the Alert constructor in alert-constructor.md.
- Expanded the default options documentation for the Alert component in alert-default-options.md.
- Translated and updated the Korean documentation for the Alert API demo, constructor, default options, and overview.
